fields.title: International Food & Music Festival
fields.description: Celebrate diverse cultures with authentic international cuisine and live performances by artists from around the world. Perfect weekend plan for family and friends.

fields.title: Modern Art Exhibition
fields.description: Explore a collection of contemporary paintings, sculptures, and interactive digital art pieces from emerging global artists.

fields.title: Python for Data Science Bootcamp
fields.description: An intensive weekend bootcamp covering NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, and Scikit-Learn. Learn to build your first machine learning models and analyze real-world datasets.

fields.title: Tech & AI Hackathon 2026
fields.description: A 48-hour hackathon bringing together developer teams to build cutting-edge solutions using generative AI and machine learning tools.

fields.title: Summer Rock Fest
fields.description: An outdoor music festival featuring the best independent rock bands, food trucks, and art stalls.

fields.title: Nature Photography Workshop
fields.description: Learn the art of landscape and wildlife photography from professional photographers in the scenic hills of Munnar.

fields.title: Kerala Startup Networking Meet
fields.description: Connect with founders, investors, and startup mentors to share ideas and explore funding opportunities.

fields.title: Green Run Half Marathon
fields.description: Join the annual charity run through beautiful tea estates to raise awareness about forest conservation.

fields.title: Annual Book Fair & Lit Fest
fields.description: A week-long celebration of literature featuring book launches, author interactions, panel discussions, and writing workshops.

fields.title: Stand-up Comedy Night
fields.description: Get ready for a night of laughter with some of the country's finest stand-up comedians performing live.

fields.title: Malabar Cookery Masterclass
fields.description: Discover the secrets of traditional Malabar cuisine, from perfect biryanis to exquisite seafood dishes, guided by expert chefs.

fields.title: React & Next.js Masterclass
fields.description: An intensive hands-on workshop covering advanced React topics, Server Components, SSR, and deploying high-performance applications with Next.js.

fields.title: Mindfulness & Yoga Weekend
fields.description: Rejuvenate your mind and body with sunrise yoga, guided meditation sessions, and organic vegan dining by the cliffs of Varkala.
